summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CaseDesk AI with new Ollama features. Authentication issue from iteration 1 is RESOLVED. All core functionality working. Backend APIs fully functional (27/27 tests passed). Frontend loads correctly with new AI features integrated.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay interception prevents clicking navigation links when forms are open
ui_bugs.details: Dialog overlay with bg-black/80 intercepts pointer events when modal is open, blocking navigation clicks

design_issues.issue: AI Configuration shows OpenAI as current provider instead of Ollama as default/recommended
design_issues.details: Backend has Ollama integration but frontend settings show OpenAI (ChatGPT) as configured provider. Should show Ollama as recommended option.

passed_tests: Login with admin@casedesk.app / admin123 (FIXED from iteration 1)
Dashboard loads correctly with stats display
Documents page loads with search and upload functionality
Cases page loads with existing case and create functionality
Case creation form with all fields (Title, Description, Reference, Status)
Tasks page loads with create functionality
Calendar page loads with proper calendar view
AI Chat page loads with functional chat interface
Settings page with AI Configuration tab

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (All pages load, forms work, navigation works, minor UI bugs present)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Fix modal overlay click interception issue for navigation, 2) Update AI Configuration settings to show Ollama as default/recommended provider instead of OpenAI. All core features working correctly.
